{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"20260323190737BFDF738FE36864D24317\"}"},"total":1},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7408928523561026366","common":{"comment_type":-90,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"毒点太多了"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1725029048,"group_id":"7400312485934287896","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N5pDMd56xjt9rwbgPaGTjxU=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"110911794556","user_name":"爱吃糖拌草莓的韩伟"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"110911794556","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":true,"sticker":{"expire_time":1782612670,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFF3DD","can_worn":false,"id":2,"name":"永不书荒","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/2c704b96a929a7a8b3461ddbf49a8d01","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b93ef223f8131d9ee8e8312f642d9681"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"svip","icon":"{\"icon_default_url\":\"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/07d37b2c30d271228698f77f4f7f7daf\",\"icon_dark_url\":\"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d67f15fefbb4470bb54c773eb84e90d8\",\"icon_width\":26,\"icon_height\":16}","intro":"{\"title_name\":\"svip\",\"title_id\":\"svip\",\"icon_type\":1}","is_author_title":false,"is_vip_title":true,"zh_title":"svip"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7400312485934287896","book_info":{"abstract":"年入上亿的集团老总赵宇一夜醒来，竟穿越到了宋朝，还摇身一变，成了皇太子。\n在这个式微的朝代，当皇太子简直就是要老命啊！\n但知道历史的赵宇，开启逆天改命模式，夺下皇位，不仅让宋朝迅速崛起，还开疆拓土，甚至版图都超过了大元……让万国来朝！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/f654d2d2d99792cbf22e6cbfa88eaa2d~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"宋人头","author_id":"","book_id":"7400312485934287896","book_name":"我在宋朝当皇太子","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#201810","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":273,\"name\":\"历史古代\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=273\u0026name=历史古代\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":37,\"name\":\"穿越\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37\u0026name=穿越\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":12,\"name\":\"历史\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12\u0026name=历史\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":501,\"name\":\"宋朝\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=501\u0026name=宋朝\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7402134221818432537","read_count":"662","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"744697"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"362","tags":"历史古代,历史,穿越,宋朝","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/f654d2d2d99792cbf22e6cbfa88eaa2d~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1779448057\u0026x-signature=g5oz%2Bc%2BgUFWrONlW5ZFgurC98x8%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"21"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"20260323190737BFDF738FE36864D24317\"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"2","score_suffix_text":"阅读不足30分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":3,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":1799,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":289},"user_action":{"author
